privileged_info_summary: The task operates within a synthetic Safe Exam Browser Server environment configured via the anhefti/seb-server:v2.2-stable Docker image with a demo profile. Configuration data is generated automatically via Flyway scripts. Verification is performed dynamically by querying the seb-server-mariadb container via export_result.sh to ensure that an exam configuration's version history includes a description with the string 'EXPERIMENTAL' (confirming the initial edit was made) and that the current, active version description no longer contains it (confirming the rollback).
